sevenDay.synopsis: A line of strong storms is moving in, and Moderate TS (G32kts) are possible between 07-0930L. Once this line moves thru, the PM/N1 should be fine. The next three days will feature waves of showers/ISOLD TS. Cigs move in tomorrow near midnight, remaining stubborn thru Saturday AM. Same goes for Saturday N1 into Sunday AM. Rain chances continue for Monday, and then we should finally clear out.
